item.title: Grieving mother demands answers nearly 2 years after Florida deputy fatally shot airman
item.description: The mother of a U.S. Air Force airman shot by a Florida deputy nearly two years ago wants people to remember her son

item.title: Gov. Tim Walz says federal immigration crackdown in Minnesota could end within days
item.description: Gov. Tim Walz says the federal immigration crackdown in Minnesota could end soon

item.title: US's largest public utility says it now doesn't want to close two coal-fired plants
item.description: The nationâs largest public utility says it now would prefer to keep operating two coal-fired power plants it had planned to shutter

item.title: Annual governors' gathering with White House unraveling after Trump excludes Democrats
item.description: The National Governors Association annual conference is unraveling after President Donald Trump did not invite some Democrats to events

item.title: Investors impatient to recover $140M from alleged Georgia Ponzi scheme
item.description: Seven months after an alleged $140 million Ponzi scheme collapsed, investors are impatient to recover their money
